tools.name: analyze_contract
tools.description: First-pass review of ONE contract: plain-language summary, risk flags (with severity low|medium|high and explanations), key terms (parties, dates, term, termination notice, governing law, payment terms, auto-renewal), and presence/absence of 8 standard clauses with verbatim evidence excerpts. Input:

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check the current billing period usage for YOUR WizerAPI organization: plan, included AU, used AU, remaining AU, overage so far, and the per-minute rate limit. Costs 0 AU and is never blocked by the session budget. Call this BEFORE large metered jobs (theme extraction over many reviews, long contrac
